arts.ttl: Barcelona star rejected a €60m-per-year summer offer from Saudi Arabia
arts.sum: A leading member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona rejected a staggering financial offer from the Middle East over the summer. That’s according to Diario AS, citing…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star’s new role confirmed in starting XI to face Monaco
arts.sum: The new role entrusted to a member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has on Thursday night been confirmed. The player in question? Eric García. Defender Eric,…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star 'rejected' £50m-a-year salary to leave Camp Nou over summer
arts.sum: Robert Lewandowski reportedly rejected a €60m (£50m)-a-year salary to leave Barcelona for Saudi Arabia over the summer.

arts.ttl: La Liga chief Tebas confirms Barcelona’s new payroll
arts.sum: La Liga president Javier Tebas has on Thursday confirmed the new yearly payroll at Barcelona. And the figure reiterates the importance of the ongoing work being carried out by the…

arts.ttl: AS Monaco to innovate to counter Lamine Yamal’s influence
arts.sum: In an attempt to mitigate Lamine Yamal’s influence on proceedings, Adi Hütter is expected to innovate as AS Monaco prepare to face Barcelona in their UEFA Champions League opener. Ordinarily,…

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Dani Olmo playing for Barcelona against Monaco in the Champions League today?
arts.sum: They will hope their superb domestic form translates to the Champions League, although they head into their Matchday 1 fixture away to Monaco without a number of first-team players, including summer signing Dani Olmo. Like Olmo, Ronald Araújo is also dealing with a hamstring injury, although he would’ve been suspended for Thursday’s game anyway having been sent off on his last Champions League appearance against PSG in the 2023/24 quarter-final second leg.

arts.ttl: MATCH REPORT | Monaco 4-3 Barcelona: La Diagonale beat La Masia in UEFA Youth League opener
arts.sum: UEFA Youth League, Round 1, 19/09/24 Luke Entwistle reporting from La Turbie AS Monaco’s La Diagonale academy got the better of Barcelona’s La Masia (4-3) in a topsy-turvy affair in the UEFA Youth League. Monaco…

arts.ttl: Chelsea eye Barcelona star to replace James
arts.sum: Reece James ’ latest injury blow has caused Chelsea to consider their right-back options in January, with a big money move for a former target reportedly on the agenda. Jeremie Frimpong is being considered as a ‘high-profile’ option, while Barcelona ’s Jules Kounde is also set to be a target, however a younger player is said to be the ‘most likely’ avenue for Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Is Monaco part of France or its own country? Why do they play in the French league?
arts.sum: Governed under a constitutional monarchy with Prince Albert II as its head of state, the Principality of Monaco, as it’s officially known, is a coastal sovereign city-state and one of six European microstates, along with Andorra, Liechtenstein, Malta, San Marino and the Vatican City. A league they have won on eight occasions, making them its fourth most successful club ever, despite not even being French.

arts.ttl: All of Lamine Yamal’s ‘youngest player’ records with Barcelona and Spain
arts.sum: Yamal hasn’t yet scored in the Champions League and has missed the chance to break the record for the youngest goalscorer in UCL history. That was just two months after his 16th birthday, but he didn’t quite break the record for the youngest player in the Champions League.
